XNetXnAddrToInAddr

Converts an Xbox network complete address to an Internet address that is usable by Winsock.

INT XNetXnAddrToInAddr(
    const XNADDR *pxna,
    const XNKID *pxnkid,
    IN_ADDR *pina
);

Parameters

pxna
[in] Address of an XNADDR structure that specifies the Xbox network complete address information.
pxnkid
[in] Address of an XNKID structure that specifies the key identifier.
pina
[out] Address of an IN_ADDR structure that recieves the Internet address.

Return Values

Returns zero if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

The Internet address returned by XNetXnAddrToInAddr is not valid outside of the context of the Xbox on which XNetXnAddrToInAddr was called. A different Xbox or PC cannot use this Internet addres.

The IN_ADDR type is typedef'd to an in_addr.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Winsockx.h, for include use Xtl.h.

Import Library: Use Xnet.lib for titles that only support system link play, XOnline.lib for titles that support online play. Use the secure versions of the library file (Xnets.lib or XOnlines.lib) for final testing.
